name: @forgeax/app-learn-render-1-getting-started-2-hello-triangle
description: learn-render LearnOpenGL section 1.2 hello-triangle — Engine.create + world.spawn + HANDLE_TRIANGLE demo.

forgeax._smokeInvocationReason: OOS-10 / D-7: smoke gate subset is textures + camera only; 1.2 redirects to apps/hello/triangle which already owns the dawn-node smoke anchor (PD-4 SSOT).

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle (dist/assets) shape is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime size already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: OOS-11 fps anchor stays on hello-triangle; this app redirects to apps/hello/triangle which is the fps anchor

bench.reason: pixel-parity bench drives parity-forgeax vs parity-threejs; learn-render entry baseline is copied from apps/hello/triangle

gate.reason: smoke gate subset = 4.textures + 7.camera only (D-7); 1.2 hello-triangle visual is the LO 1.2 unlit-orange minimal mapping, no pixel-parity link to apps/hello/triangle (which uses PBR grey + DirectionalLight as the engine baseline)

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; redirect to apps/hello/triangle
